backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Icon, Connection, FreehandDrawing, Line, TextLabel, Image, DiagramState) and CRUD operations for diagrams and user profiles, with access control enforced via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three canvas behavior requirements (icon drag label separation, vertical label centering, z-order layering) to their implementing source files and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a build-planning reference for the project's React/TypeScript frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Threat Hunting Portal' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the Vite entry module.
frontend/index.ts: Standalone snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, and attack-path pages, guards them behind Internet Identity authentication, and conditionally shows a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Large interactive canvas component managing drag-and-drop icons, freehand/line/arrow drawing, text labels, images, connections, eraser, and free-transform (resize/rotate) via a discriminated-union DragState, rendering everything as positioned HTML/SVG layers.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG component rendering a directed connector arrow between two canvas points, supporting optional rotation, selection highlighting, and a wider invisible hit area for easier clicking.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Defines an `AttackPathIcon` React component that renders a named icon image (from a fixed map of 30+ attack-path icon types) with an optional label, supporting drag behavior when used in a toolbar.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Renders the attack-path diagram toolbar with draggable icon tiles, drawing/text tool buttons, color/stroke/font-size controls, undo/clear/save actions, and image upload handling.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Displays a sidebar listing all saved diagrams with metadata (icon count, connections, last modified date), and supports loading or deleting a diagram via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the top-level page layout with a sticky header/nav (Reports, Attack Path, New Report links, user profile, login button), an optional hero banner on the home page, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: A modal dialog that lists all saved diagrams with their metadata and lets the user load a selected diagram or delete one via a nested confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen that prompts unauthenticated users to authenticate via Internet Identity, showing a loading state while the login is in progress.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component that provides a searchable popover for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, plus an input for adding custom technique strings, displaying all selections as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using `generateReportPdf`, showing a loading spinner during generation and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that forces new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, submitting via `useSaveCallerUserProfile` and blocking dismissal until saved.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, managing fields like title, author, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and remediation details before submitting the collected data.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name for saving an attack path diagram, calling the provided `onSave` callback with the trimmed name.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: A static data file exporting a typed array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques, each with an ID, name, and description, covering categories like Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A React hook that manages the full state of an attack path canvas—including icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, and selection—with undo history support and callbacks for all mutation operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend, with custom loading/fetched state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by its bigint ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get one, save, delete), but all backend calls are stubbed out as the report functionality has been removed from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state via the actor and invalidates related diagram query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component that composes the attack path diagram editor, including a sidebar for saved diagrams, a toolbar, and a canvas, with save/load functionality backed by the diagram state hooks.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a form for creating a threat hunt report and submits it via the useSaveReport mutation, navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a detailed view of a single threat hunt report including metadata, findings, MITRE techniques, and a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React page that lists all threat hunting reports in a table with view, download (PDF), and delete actions. Uses query hooks for data fetching and an alert dialog for delete confirmation.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a styled PDF report by opening a new browser window with formatted HTML content and triggering the print dialog. Renders report metadata, MITRE techniques, threat actors, and IOCs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography, border radius, font families, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app targeting an ICP/DFX environment, with path aliasing, canister environment variable injection, API proxy to local DFX replica, and global polyfill.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking implemented features and pending requests for a canvas diagram tool, focusing on icon-only drag behavior, vertically centered text labels, and layer ordering of drawings over background images.
